content: Open source GitHub remote was created as public repo jeanpfs/bd-board, origin uses HTTPS, and main tracks origin/main.
Upstream PR opened at https://github.com/gastownhall/beads/pull/4349 to list bd-board in docs/COMMUNITY_TOOLS.md under Web UIs.

Updated pnpm/action-setup from v4 to v6 because v4 action.yml declares runs.using node20 while v6 declares node24; this directly removes the deprecated Node 20 action runtime without adding workflow flags.
GitHub run 27235455764 passed with pnpm/action-setup@v6 and actions/setup-node@v6 on Node v24.14.0; the previous Node.js 20 deprecation annotation did not appear.

Treat project knowledge as structured Beads comments with prefixes, not Lavra files. This keeps bd-board agnostic while still showing entries emitted by Lavra or any other agent/human using bd comments.
Project-level knowledge can be derived directly from Beads comments by querying the comments table for structured prefixes, keeping bd-board independent of Lavra storage.

Moved Board/Knowledge project navigation out of the board-only action cluster. The tablist now anchors beside the project identity, while filters/search/create render only for the Board tab, preventing position shifts when switching tabs.

Removed the per-status header count cluster because it duplicated the board columns and competed with project identity/tab navigation. The header now keeps only the compact total count next to the project name.
Keep the compact done/total count in the epic swimlane header and hide the longer EpicProgress label when showDots is false. This removes duplicate completion text while preserving the progress bar.
